title: Virtual Try-On Identity Lock
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for virtual try-on studies that preserve one model identity while changing only clothing, styling, and garment context.

en.title: Virtual Try-On Identity Lock
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for virtual try-on studies that preserve one model identity while changing only clothing, styling, and garment context.

zh-CN.title: 虚拟试衣 · 身份零漂移
zh-CN.description: 测试虚拟试衣中的身份锁定: 脸、五官、肤色和体型保持一致,只改变服装与造型。
